security.csp: default-src 'self' asset:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https:; img-src 'self' asset: data: blob: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' asset: data:; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; frame-ancestors 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';
security.devCsp: default-src 'self' asset:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:8066 http://127.0.0.1:8066 ws://localhost:8066 ws://127.0.0.1:8066 https:; img-src 'self' asset: data: blob: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' asset: data:; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; frame-ancestors 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';

bundle.shortDescription: Reusable Tauri desktop shell built on Vue and Vite.
bundle.longDescription: This repository provides a reusable Tauri desktop shell with a Vue and Vite frontend, environment-aware build commands, desktop splash support, and packaging defaults that can be embedded into other projects.
